title: American Chicken Burger
description: A classic American-style burger topped with crispy chicken and fresh ingredients.
instructions: Preheat a non-stick skillet or griddle over medium heat.
Season the chicken breast with salt, pepper, and any other desired seasonings.
Cook the chicken for 5-6 minutes on each side or until it reaches an internal temperature of 165°F.
Meanwhile, toast the burger bun and cook the bacon until crispy.
Assemble the burger by spreading mayonnaise on the bottom bun, followed by a slice of cheese, a few pieces of lettuce, a few slices of tomato, and finally the cooked chicken.
Top with the remaining cheese, bacon, and top bun.
